response:
| **Pros of Remote Work**                  | **Cons of Remote Work**                     |
|------------------------------------------|---------------------------------------------|
| **1. Flexibility** – Set your own schedule and work from anywhere with internet. | **1. Isolation** – Lack of in-person social interaction can lead to loneliness. |
| **2. No Commute** – Save time and money on transportation and parking. | **2. Blurred Work-Life Boundaries** – Harder to "switch off" at the end of the day. |
| **3. Reduced Office Distractions** – Fewer interruptions from colleagues and meetings. | **3. Limited Collaboration** – Harder to brainstorm spontaneously or read body language. |
